notes:
In only get a black screen with no sound, with a non game specific mouse cursor and working Steam Overlay. 
Disabling Esync and using Wine D3D11 did absolutely nothing and disabling D3D11 just ended in an error message that dirextX11 is missing on my system (although the game should actually support DX10).
I also tried -onethread, which didn't do anything too.

Especially unfortunate as the previous Episodes (which also actually have native Linux version) run perfectly fine through Proton as far as I tested them.
title: Bear With Me: The Lost Robots
